Docs.summary: The top-level properties that can be selected on the function's output. eg - [ \"name\", \"location\" ] if vault().name and vault().location are supported.

Docs.summary: A value indicating whether the custom properties within the property bag are allowed. Needs api-version to be specified in the policy rule eg - vault('2019-06-01').
